sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's there to do around here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds great! I'll be sure to try those things.

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: I guess. It's a bit weird though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Many would say the same about drinking blood. What do they know though?

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: There's nothing to do in this city. Might be time to give the theatre a visit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear it's all the rage.

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: Indeed it is. I'd recommend going yourself if you haven't been before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been a few times. Always worth another trip though. See you around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey. Anything interesting going on around here?

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: Well rumour is that there's some plans for a new tithing project. Apparently, they're going to put the humans in boxes and drain their blood over time to be collected in batches.

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: I hear they're calling it the Tithe Farm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds... great. Although, I have heard of another Tithe Farm very far from here.

lines.speaker: Vyre
lines.text: Ah, the one that runs it must also be a vyre of culture.
